headline: Cadence LiDAR IP Win With Aeva Highlights Expanding Physical AI Role
summary: Cadence Design Systems (NasdaqGS:CDNS) has licensed its Tensilica Vision DSP IP to Aeva for use in advanced 4D LiDAR systems. The agreement expands Cadence's role in autonomous systems and AI-driven sensor processing for vehicles and industrial robotics. The deal highlights commercial adoption of Cadence's IP in physical AI and real-time perception applications. For investors watching NasdaqGS:CDNS, this agreement puts a spotlight on Cadence's role behind the scenes in autonomous vehicles...
